programme.title: Love Monster
programme.desc: 'S2/E17'. Love Monster brings Monster Teddy extreme skiing on Mount Fluffaroo even though he isn't tall enough and must rescue him when he falls from the ski lift.

programme.title: Love Monster
programme.desc: 'S2/E18'. Love Monster creates a new dance for Tiniest Fluffiest Bunny's birthday but when word gets out, the whole of Fluffytown wants to see him perform it which makes him feel nervous!

programme.title: Go Jetters
programme.desc: 'S2/E14 - Bullet Train, Japan'. All aboard for a high-speed adventure, as the Go Jetters visit Japan's Bullet Train.

programme.title: Go Jetters
programme.desc: 'S2/E41 - Bishop Rock Lighthouse, Isles of Scilly'. Glitch plunges the sea into darkness in a night-time adventure near the Isles of Scilly.

programme.title: Rastamouse
programme.desc: 'S2/E6 - Boom Box Bust'. The Easy Crew try to find out why the President hates Wensley Dale's new charity record.

programme.title: Andy's Dinosaur Adventures
programme.desc: 'S1/E20 - Allosaurus and Salt'. Andy travels back in time to get some salt for Hatty so she can make a fossilised footprint of an allosaurus, a dinosaur that roamed the salt flats of North America 145 million years ago.

programme.title: Andy's Prehistoric Adventures
programme.desc: 'S1/E15 - Australopithecus and Hair'. Andy travels back three million years where he tracks down the ancient tribe of australopithecus primates, but he has his trusty backpack stolen by hungry vultures.

programme.title: Andy's Safari Adventures
programme.desc: 'S1/E36 - Andy and The Black Crested Macaques'. When Andy mistakenly eats a bowl of exotic fruit salad that Mr Hammond left for the black crested macaques, Andy jets off to Sulawesi in search of more.

programme.title: In The Night Garden ZinkyZonk Specials
programme.desc: When the toys of the Night Garden cant sleep, the Zonk leads them to the ZonkyZoney, an enchanted grove where they can zinkyzzzonk in peace.

programme.title: Catie's Amazing Machines
programme.desc: 'S1/E16 - Flying Machines'. Rally driver Catie heads to an airfield to see three amazing machines that fly! She first tries flying a jet plane, then checks out an amazing space shuttle and then pilots a helicopter.

programme.title: My Pet And Me: Vet Tales
programme.desc: 'S2/E20 - Whitby the Cat'. Rory visits May and her pet cat Whitby, together they take Whitby to the vet for an operation to help his arthritis. Ferne joins the vet who helps look after military animals.

programme.title: My Pet And Me
programme.desc: 'S3/E3 - Felix the Station Cat'. Ferne visits a train station and meets a special cat called Felix who lives there.

programme.title: The Numtums

programme.title: Go Jetters
programme.desc: 'S2/E11 - Harbin Ice City, China'. GrimHQ overheats so lands in Harbin Ice City, melting the amazing ice sculptures.

programme.desc: 'S1/E10 - Naughty Pumpkin'. Postman Pat and his faithful cat Jess have joined the Special Delivery Service - they must deliver anything, anytime, anywhere.

programme.title: Ranger Hamza's Eco Quest

programme.title: Shaun The Sheep
programme.desc: 'S2/E32 - Operation Pidsley'. Pidsley takes a photo of the sheep and Bitzer partying in the farmhouse. So they must stop Pidsley from telling on them before the Farmer gets back.

programme.title: Grace's Amazing Machines
programme.desc: 'S4/E9 - Balance Machines'. Grace looks at three amazing balance machines: a velodrome bike, electric rollerskates and a hoverboard.

programme.title: Shaun The Sheep

programme.title: Shaun The Sheep
programme.desc: 'S1/E22 - Bitzer Puts His Foot in It'. The Farmer is laying concrete and Bitzer is left to guard it while it dries, but the wet cement proves to be too much of a temptation.

programme.desc: 'S1/E16 - Yoga Ball'. Bingo loves playing with Dad, but sometimes he forgets Bingo is smaller than her sister. Mum teaches Bingo how to use her big girl bark to keep the fun within her limits.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S1/E17 - Calypso'. At school, Bluey and her friends enjoy various games. Teacher Calypso keeps her charges on track with a wise word and a song... all except the mysterious Pretzel.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S1/E35 - Zoo'. Bluey's backyard zoo is home to wonderful animals, especially the big blue Daddy gorilla. But when he grabs visitor Bingo and escapes, Zookeeper Bluey must recapture the wild beast.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S1/E36 - Backpackers'. Mum and Dad are going on an adventure wearing the kids as their cheeky backpacks! Seeing the sights and buying street food, backpacking is a blast - until they lose their passports.

programme.desc: 'S1/E37 - The Adventure'. Princesses, horses and magic wands. Bluey and Chloe can play any role they want, when they embark on an adventure to save their playground kingdom from the Greedy Queen.

programme.title: Bluey

programme.title: She Made Me Do It?

programme.title: World's Most Evil Killers
programme.desc: 'S3/E13 - Derrick Bird'. In Cumbria 2010, taxi driver Derrick Bird, in less than 24 hours, shot dead 12 people and injured 11 more. The callous killer only stopped when he'd run out of ammunition, finally shooting himself.

programme.title: World's Most Evil Killers
programme.desc: 'S3/E14 - Danny Rolling'. Danny Rolling, a.k.a the Gainesville Ripper, murdered five students in Florida over four days in 1990. Rolling also confessed to murdering three generations of one family including an 8 year old boy.

programme.title: Voice Of A Serial Killer

programme.title: Accident, Suicide Or Murder

programme.title: The Quick And The Dead
programme.desc: A female gunfighter returns to a frontier town where a dueling tournament is being held, which she enters in an effort to avenge her father's death.

programme.desc: 'S1/E4'. Tony Robinson explores machines that help us mere mortals become superhuman. From a tree-chopping-device faster than twenty lumberjacks, to a jet-powered suit that could be worn by flying paramedics.

programme.desc: 'S1/E1 - Chase Me'. When a 50-year-old woman is found dead in her home, all that's left behind is a note that reads, 'Chase me.' Police search relentlessly for the remorseless psychopath.

programme.title: Signs Of A Psychopath
programme.desc: 'S1/E7 - I Could Hear Her Calling My Name'. When a girl disappears after school, her last known steps are caught on CCTV. The footage leads detectives to two dark minds and a sinister crime.

programme.title: Signs Of A Psychopath
programme.desc: 'S1/E2 - Into the Woods at Midnight'. Three locals are found brutally murdered in a quaint village in Maine. The killer leads detectives into the woods, where he buried his fourth victim.

programme.title: Murder Under The Friday Night Lights
programme.desc: 'S2/E3 - A Killer's Bet'. When a football coach vanishes, police investigate a secret betting ring. A chain of clues leads them to one gambler who couldn't pay up.

programme.title: Murder Under The Friday Night Lights
programme.desc: 'S2/E4 - Who Shot Darrent Williams?'. On New Year's Eve, NFL player and former Texas high school football star Darrent Williams is at a party. Soon after midnight, he's shot dead.

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare
programme.desc: 'S6/E8 - Danger In Store'. After a bad breakup, a single mum finds love again. But after the couple moves to Florida with her daughter, relationship problems hit a brutal point of no return.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: Shadows Of Death
programme.desc: 'S3/E12 - Who Killed Kay?'. In 2008, a man found his wife murdered at home. With few clues in the case, investigators quickly learn that all is not what it seems in her picture-perfect life.

programme.title: How To Create A Sex Scandal
programme.desc: 'S1/E1 - When The Swingers Came To Town'. In 2005, Mineola, Texas, is thrown into turmoil when three children reveal shocking stories about a paedophile sex ring at a local swingers club.

programme.title: How To Create A Sex Scandal
programme.desc: 'S1/E2 - Smoke And Mirrors'. During the trial of the fourth perpetrator in the Mineola Swingers Club case, a child's vital testimony reveals a jaw-dropping truth, veering the case off-course.

programme.title: How To Create A Sex Scandal
programme.desc: 'S1/E3 - Sex, Lies, And Videotapes'. As the truth about the Mineola Swingers Club emerges, the parents begin to rebuild their lives. But there is one final mystery to be solved.

programme.title: 15 Seconds
programme.desc: A lady's husband does not satisfy her in bed, she tried all she could to get back to her ex. Little did she know that he was in love with her best friend.

programme.title: Affliction
programme.desc: Everything a lady she does works against her, little did she know that her mother sacrificed her to the shrine before her birth.

programme.title: Hunter Boy

programme.title: Lifelines With Mima

programme.title: Don't Leave Me
programme.desc: Love overcomes all, as in the case of Eze the village farmer and grace the undergraduate.

programme.title: Nemesis
programme.desc: A lady is cursed after beating up an old woman to death, now she must pay for the sins committed as she battles her husband daily for peace.

programme.desc: Ifeoma tries to kill her husband but fails, thanks to the maid. Will the Husband forgive her and take her back?

programme.title: My Village People
programme.desc: John Okafor as kpomkwem rapes the only daughter of Maduka and denies it. Maduka reported the case to the god of justice to be cursed and ruin his life.

programme.title: My Past
programme.desc: Kenneth's mother kills his father and warns him never to speak to anyone about it. Now his past haunts him and everyone around him feels the hurt of the wrong his mother did.

programme.desc: The talented Amy Schumer stars in this unconventional, raunchy rom-com about a commitment-phobic, hard-partying magazine writer who falls for a sports doctor.

programme.title: Last Call
programme.desc: A funny comedy with a heart. A real estate developer returns to his old Philly neighbourhood and faces a tough decision: shut down or resurrect his family bar.

programme.title: Why Can't My Life Be A Rom Com?
programme.desc: An enjoyable romcom about the hardships of dating. A newly single, jobless woman changes her approach to romance and follows dating rules from a 50-year-old self-help book.

programme.title: Love Knotts
programme.desc: An enjoyable rom-com. Jodie, who fears the port's expansion plans will tear her family's sail-making company, meets the architect behind the project.

programme.title: Wild Mountain Thyme
programme.desc: Golden Globe winner Emily Blunt drives this quirky rom-com set across a beautiful Irish landscape. Two star-crossed lovers become entangled in a land dispute between their families.

programme.title: The Lego Movie
programme.desc: This critical hit features beautiful animation and a superb story. Chris Pratt voices an unsuspecting Lego construction worker who is chosen to fight an evil tyrant.

programme.title: Tad: The Lost Explorer And The...
programme.desc: 'Tad: The Lost Explorer And The Emerald Tablet'. An adventure-filled animation. After Tad accidentally unleashes a curse that endangers his friends, he sets out to reverse it.

programme.title: Two Can Play That Game
programme.desc: Vivica A. Fox and Morris Chestnut star in this romantic comedy. A woman attempts to keep her man in check with a series of mind-games, but what happens when he starts playing too?

programme.title: Tim Burton's Corpse Bride
programme.desc: Acclaimed director Tim Burton spins a quirky tale of a tragic romance in this sensitive animated master piece. A corpse mistakenly believes that a human man wants to marry her.

programme.title: Madagascar 3: Europe's Most Wanted
programme.desc: A star-studded voice cast (Ben Stiller, Chris Rock), loads of action, superb visuals and plenty of gags ensure the third attempt by the animals to return to NYC is a win.

programme.title: Liar Liar
programme.desc: Golden Globe winner Jim Carrey learns hard lessons in this comedy. After being lied to by his lawyer father, a boy makes a wish for him to stop lying, and the wish comes true.

programme.title: The Hunger Games
programme.desc: Based on the wildly popular young adult novels, Jennifer Lawrence stars as a fierce young woman who saves her sister by taking her place in a game of death.

programme.title: Deadland
programme.desc: A captivating Western thriller. US border patrol agent Angel Waters makes a routine apprehension, but it soon spirals into his worst nightmare.

programme.title: Play Dead
programme.desc: A game of cat-and-mouse drives this thriller. When a student fakes her death to steal evidence from a morgue, she finds that the scariest thing is not the dead but the living.

programme.title: Breakout
programme.desc: Having taken control of a maximum security prison, a criminal mastermind faces off against a retired Black Ops agent who had been visiting his incarcerated son.

programme.title: Redemption In Cherry Springs
programme.desc: An intriguing mystery film. After returning home following the fallout from a story, a reporter investigates a friend's disappearance, much to the dismay of the local detective.

programme.title: Framed By My Sister
programme.desc: A twisted and suspenseful thriller about revenge between triplets. Twin sisters Reina and Alex are targeted by an angry long-lost triplet seeking to right old wrongs.

programme.title: Austin Powers In Goldmember
programme.desc: Mike Myers returns as the grooviest super spy. This time he must save his kidnapped father by travelling back to 1975 to defeat the villainous team of Goldmember and Dr Evil.

programme.title: Austin Powers: The Spy Who Shagged Me
programme.desc: Mike Myers returns as the groovy spy in this sequel to the cult classic. Dr Evil is back with a new time machine that allows him to travel back in time to steal Austin Powers' mojo.

programme.title: Dunkirk
programme.desc: Visionary director Christopher Nolan revisits the historical battle of Dunkirk in this Oscar-winning war drama, about a devastating combat that turned the tide of World War II.

programme.title: The Pharma
programme.desc: A suspenseful thriller. After developing an experimental strain of marijuana that fights cancer, a veteran marine finds himself in a war against the pharmaceutical industry.

programme.title: Deep Blue Sea
programme.desc: Samuel L. Jackson and Thomas Jane star in this deep-sea shark thriller. Scientists create killer sharks while searching for a cure for Alzheimer's disease. Now they are being hunted.

programme.title: Badges Of Fury
programme.desc: Martial arts legend Jet Li stars in this action comedy. A young detective is paired with his buddy cop to figure out who is responsible for a string of murders across Hong Kong.

programme.title: Black Adam
programme.desc: Dwayne Johnson is the ancient anti-hero in this superhero movie. 5 000 years after being given the powers of the gods, Black Adam is freed, unleashing his unique form of justice.

programme.title: Kandahar
programme.desc: Gerard Butler fights against the odds in this war movie. A CIA operative and his translator flee from special forces in Afghanistan after exposing a covert mission.

programme.title: Cocaine Bear
programme.desc: A fun, outrageous action comedy loosely based on actual events. An oddball group must contend with a black bear on a murderous rampage after consuming cocaine.

programme.title: Vampire's House Of Cain
programme.desc: A fanged crime thriller. A detective investigating a series of murders is caught in a war between two Vampire clans.

programme.title: Barefoot Contessa: Back To Basics

programme.title: Raven's Home
programme.desc: 'S6/E106'. When the Baxters go to London to visit Victor, Alice gets mistaken as royalty. Neil and Lazlo's Chill Grill advertisement brings in a crowd they weren't expecting.

programme.desc: 'S6/E107'. Alice runs into trouble at Buckingham Palace, and Raven, Booker, and Victor come to the rescue. Meanwhile, Neil and Lazlo try to get the unexpected patrons out of the Chill Grill.

programme.title: Walk The Prank

programme.desc: 'S3/E76 - Skiddley Whiffers, Tour de Ferb'. Candace holds the record for playing the game Skiddley Whiffers, but the boys decide to make a giant version round the town.

programme.desc: 'S1/E2 - Dead Silence'. Darrell seeks clues from Cooper's past. His widow reveals many secrets, but a former NASA flight director won't say a word. A big piece is missing in Darrell's mission.

programme.title: Treasure Quest: Snake Island
programme.desc: 'S1/E4 - Dire Consequences'. As injuries pile up, the team push deeper into the Island in search of the Treasure of the Trinity, but a trail of clues leads to confrontation.

programme.title: Finding Bigfoot
programme.desc: 'S2/E3 - Baby Bigfoot'. The research team visit New York to investigate video footage of a baby Bigfoot. Will a new search method help them to locate Sasquatches living near the Big Apple?

programme.title: Edge Of Alaska
programme.desc: 'S2/E11 - Uprooted'. After being devastated by a powerful windstorm, it's all hands on deck as the town recovers. Mark must clear dangerously damaged trees before it's too late.

programme.title: Mysteries At The Museum
programme.desc: 'S13/E13 - Legally Haunted, Demise of the Dodo and Jersey Kaboom'. Don Wildman examines a mysterious explosion at a munitions factor during World War One. Plus, the story of a house that supposedly comes with three ghosts.

programme.title: Cooper's Treasure
programme.desc: 'S1/E1 - The Treasure Map From Space'. Treasure hunter Darrell Miklos dives the waters of Campeche, Mexico in search of shipwrecks first located by astronaut Gordon Cooper from space in 1963.

programme.title: Treasure Quest: Snake Island
programme.desc: 'S1/E3 - A Steep Price'. A discovery on the island fires up the team. But as excitement builds, a series of dangerous encounters threatens to end the mission - and people's lives.

programme.title: Finding Bigfoot
programme.desc: 'S2/E4 - Big Rhody'. The team travel to Rhode Island to examine video of a roadside sighting of a Bigfoot. Could this small state turn out to be a prime location for Sasquatch activity?

programme.title: Aliens In Alaska
programme.desc: 'S1/E8 - Above And Far Beyond'. A legendary beast attacks a cabin on the Aleutian Islands. A UFO pursues a woman as she drives through an extra-terrestrial hot spot.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown
programme.desc: 'S1/E5 - City of Gold'. Josh treks the Inca Trail through the Andes and into the Peruvian Amazon in search of a mythical city of gold. His journey takes a detour to the ruins of Machu Picchu.

programme.title: Cooper's Treasure
programme.desc: 'S1/E3 - The Columbus Connection'. Darrell visits the Atocha, a valuable shipwreck Cooper recorded 50 years ago. Experts send Darrell to an archive in Spain to hunt down an ancient manifest.

programme.title: Treasure Quest: Snake Island
programme.desc: 'S1/E5 - Radio Silence'. A dangerous run-in leads the team to an astounding new clue, but a communications breakdown leaves them in the dark about an approaching storm.

programme.title: Finding Bigfoot
programme.desc: 'S2/E5 - Buckeye Bigfoot'. The researchers recruit a team of volunteers to help them to investigate Bigfoot sightings in a forest in Ohio. Can they find evidence of the beast's existence?

programme.title: Edge Of Alaska
programme.desc: 'S2/E12 - Big Bad Wolf'. A bulldozer breakdown sends Jeremy on a high flying cross-country journey. When a wolf stalks Jenny, it's woman versus wild as she faces off with the fierce predator.

programme.title: Mysteries At The Museum
programme.desc: 'S15/E1 - Amityville Haunting and More'. Don Wildman investigates a haunted house famous for its controversy, a ghost army from WWII and a golfer with a mysterious past.

programme.title: UFO Witness
programme.desc: 'S2/E1 - The Shapeshifter'. Reports of shapeshifting UFOs reveal a potential threat to our military. Ben and Melissa set out to investigate the beings and craft behind these sightings.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown
programme.desc: 'S1/E6 - Captain Morgan's Lost Gold'. Josh dives into the Lajas Reef in search of the treasure of legendary pirate Henry Morgan. His journey takes him to a modern marvel, the Panama Canal.

programme.title: Kindred Spirits
programme.desc: 'S5/E8 - Buried Alive'. Amy, Adam and Chip visit a former United States Army post in Rhode Island. This huge fort is said to be haunted by dead soldiers and victims of various crimes.

programme.title: Ghost Bait
programme.desc: 'S1/E7 - Kaitlyn'. Bob and Tina head to Rumford, Maine. They are investigating rumours of cheerleaders being terrorised by paranormal activity in a local community centre.

programme.title: Ghost Bait
programme.desc: 'S1/E8 - Emma And Kelly'. Bob and Tina are called to help a couple concerned that a terrifying entity is haunting their children's bedroom. They head to Massachusetts to investigate.

programme.title: Ghost Adventures
programme.desc: 'S5/E2 - Kentucky Slave House'. Ghost hunters Zak Bagans, Nick Groff and Aaron Goodwin investigate reports of paranormal activity at Maysville Slave House in Kentucky.

programme.title: Ghost Nation
programme.desc: 'S1/E2 - A Nightmare in the Nursery'. The team are in Michigan to help a family find answers after their toddler thinks she saw a ghostly figure walk across a room. What will they discover?
